creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
Not when the <cc> is delegated, as is the case for se, fi, and jp.  We can't undelegate them.  We don't know what else is in those zones.

We do have copies of se and jp (ns0 is a hidden secondary).  I will try to find out what's going on there.  We don't have a copy of fi (we asked; I will ask again).

I can remove www.fr, but I'd like to try to find a contact first (in progress).
